examples.pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yǒu Zhōngwén zìmù.
examples.english: This movie has Chinese subtitles.

definition: proud (feeling of pride about one's achievements or association)

examples.hanzi: 他为自己的成就感到自豪。
examples.pinyin: Tā wèi zìjǐ de chéngjiù gǎndào zìháo.
examples.english: He feels proud of his achievements.

examples.hanzi: 这杯自来水可以直接喝吗？
examples.pinyin: Zhè bēi zìláishuǐ kěyǐ zhíjiē hē ma?
examples.english: Can this cup of tap water be drunk directly?

examples.hanzi: 他因为抑郁症而自杀了。
examples.pinyin: tā yīnwèi yìyùzhèng ér zìshā le.
examples.english: He committed suicide because of depression.

examples.hanzi: 我们应该学会自我调节。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi xuéhuì zì wǒ tiáojié.
examples.english: We should learn to self-regulate.

definition: to talk to oneself; to mutter

examples.hanzi: 他常常自言自语，让人觉得很奇怪。
examples.pinyin: Tā chángcháng zì yán zì yǔ, ràng rén juéde hěn qíguài.
examples.english: He often talks to himself, which makes people feel very strange.

definition: voluntary; of one's own free will

examples.hanzi: 他自愿参加志愿者活动。
examples.pinyin: tā zì yuàn cān jiā zhì yuàn zhě huó dòng.
examples.english: He voluntarily participated in volunteer activities.

examples.hanzi: 这家餐厅是自助的，你可以自己取食物。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng shì zìzhù de, nǐ kěyǐ zìjǐ qǔ shíwù.
examples.english: This restaurant is self-service, you can get food yourself.

examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu shì zōngsè de.
examples.english: This piece of clothing is brown.

examples.pinyin: Tā shì gōngsī de zǒngcái.
examples.english: He is the president of the company.

definition: to total; to sum up; altogether

examples.pinyin: Zǒngjì fèiyòng wéi sān qiān yuán.
examples.english: The total cost is three thousand yuan.

examples.pinyin: Zǒnglǐ fābiǎo le zhòngyào jiǎnghuà.
examples.english: The premier delivered an important speech.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ zǒngsuàn zhǎo dào nǐ le.
examples.english: I finally found you.

definition: glutinous rice dumpling wrapped in bamboo leaves

examples.hanzi: 端午节的时候，人们会吃粽子。
examples.pinyin: Duānwǔ jié de shíhou, rénmen huì chī zòngzi.
examples.english: During the Dragon Boat Festival, people eat zongzi.

examples.pinyin: Zǒuláng lǐ yǒu hěnduō mén.
examples.english: There are many doors in the corridor.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ de zúqiú duì yíng le.
examples.english: My football team won.

examples.hanzi: 他的能力足以完成这个任务。
examples.pinyin: tā de néng lì zú yǐ wán chéng zhè ge rèn wù.
examples.english: His ability is sufficient to complete this task.

examples.hanzi: 这场大雨阻碍了我们的行程。
examples.pinyin: Zhè chǎng dàyǔ zǔ'ài le wǒmen de xíngchéng.
examples.english: The heavy rain hindered our trip.

examples.pinyin: Dà shítou zǔdǎng le dàolù.
examples.english: The big stone blocked the road.

examples.pinyin: wǒ ài wǒ de zǔ guó.
examples.english: I love my motherland.

examples.pinyin: wǒmen zūnjìng zǔxiān.
examples.english: We respect our ancestors.

examples.pinyin: Tā zài zuàn yī gè dòng.
examples.english: He is drilling a hole.

examples.pinyin: Tā fànle zuì.
examples.english: He committed a crime.
